OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF CHEE YUK YIP, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING. NO ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-02-1999 CONTINUED FROM NOV-17-1999 TO JAN-05-2000 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF CHEE, YUK YIP
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
